summary: Iteration 77 testing complete. All new features verified working: removed QuickTips/RookGuide from dashboard/campaign/GM pages, character names use Outfit font, Battle Map and World Map tabs added to GM Screen with MapMaker component, Send Item panel in Party tab, ROOK hints on player page with class-specific tips. Backend endpoints for send-item and attunement working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test character Test_Orc_Wiz (a1e7babc-c582-48ec-8a64-8c71501fa281) and campaign (b51ba0e9-5b08-44ed-b3dd-4a97dd2a09f6). Items sent via send-item endpoint appear in character inventory.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 added: 1) Removed all QuickTips/RookGuide hint panels from dashboard, campaign, and GM pages. 2) Fixed character name font to Outfit (sans-serif) on homepage. 3) Added Battle Map and World Map tabs to GM Screen (now 15 tabs total: Combat, Battle Map, World Map, Location, NPCs, NPC Network, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes, Story Arcs, AI Planner, Soundboard). 4) MapMaker component with terrain palette (12 terrains), tools (Select/Paint/Erase/Clear), grid toggle, zoom, Simple/Advanced toggle, export. 5) Send Item panel in Party tab with recipient dropdown, item name, type, rarity, attunement checkbox, description, preview card, Send button. 6) ROOK hints on player page showing class-specific tips with gold 'ROOK:' prefix and dismiss button. 7) Backend endpoints POST /api/characters/{id}/send-item and PATCH /api/characters/{id}/attunement working correctly.

homepage_font.details: Character names use Outfit font (sans-serif) instead of Cinzel

no_rookguide_homepage.details: No RookGuide/QuickTips hint cards on homepage dashboard

no_quicktips_campaign.details: No QuickTips/RookGuide hint cards on Campaign Dashboard

no_quicktips_gm_screen.details: No QuickTips sidebar panel on GM Screen

battle_map_tab.details: Battle Map tab in GM sidebar with MapMaker component, terrain palette (12 terrains), tools, Simple/Advanced toggle, grid toggle, zoom, export

world_map_tab.details: World Map tab in GM sidebar with same MapMaker component in world mode

send_item_panel.details: Send Item to Player panel in Party tab with recipient dropdown, item name, type, rarity, attunement checkbox, description, preview card, Send button

session_timer.details: Session Timer visible in GM Screen header (00:00 format with play/pause/reset)

initiative_tracker.details: Initiative Tracker in Combat tab with add combatant, Roll All, Start Combat, Next Turn

rook_hints_player.details: Gold-colored ROOK hints bar on player page showing class-specific tips (e.g., 'ROOK: Your spellbook is your power...' for Wizard)

backstory_tab.details: Backstory tab found on player page

rest_panel.details: Short Rest and Long Rest buttons in Combat tab with hit dice selector

send_item_endpoint.details: POST /api/characters/{id}/send-item working - GM can send items with name, type, rarity, description, requires_attunement

attunement_endpoint.details: PATCH /api/characters/{id}/attunement working - toggle attunement with max 3 limit enforced

backend_tests_summary.test_send_item_success: PASS - Item sent with all fields
backend_tests_summary.test_send_item_minimal_data: PASS - Item sent with just name (defaults applied)
